summary: Operator-approved v0.5 increment built by an orchestrated agent array: full data models for the three FUTURE design docs (16 enemies, 12 ancestries, progression/research/perks), then live gameplay slices — data-driven surface_slime/cave_crawler/raider_basic with drops and density scaling, player XP across six types with levels, base levels Camp->Hamlet->Village gating population growth, and five playable ancestries with data-derived player effects. Closed with a 7-angle multi-agent code review that fixed 17 verified findings. Smoke suite grew 62 -> 90 checks, all passing.
scope: First slices of docs/FUTURE_ENEMY_DESIGN.md, FUTURE_ANCESTRIES_AND_BIOMES.md, and FUTURE_PROGRESSION_RESEARCH_AND_BASE_LEVELS.md; five commits 69224da..22ef3bd plus closeout.
next_action: Operator playthrough of v0.5; then farming + crafting menu, then research bench MVP.
